title: Finite Pivoted LU Decomposition Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite pivoted-LU bad permutation-sign QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact pivoted-LU replay computes the row-swap determinant as -1 while a malformed row claims +1, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional pivoted factorization rows only when they add distinct permutation, pivot-selection, triangular-solve, rank, residual, or block-structure solver pressure; keep pivoting correctness, growth factors, sparse behavior, conditioning, and floating-point stability in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational A, P, P*A, L, U, right-hand side, permuted right-hand side, pivots, determinant signs, triangular solve, and product as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false permutation-sign row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting determinant.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.

Keep pivoted-LU existence, partial/complete pivoting strategy correctness, rank-deficient cases, sparse pivoting, growth-factor bounds, floating-point conditioning, and stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
